Tesla's stock surged by 84%, attributed to renewed confidence in autonomy and future robotics. It is compared to other companies with market caps exceeding $2 trillion and Munster believes it has room to grow. The 'We, Robot' event showcased Tesla's autonomous driving capabilities with no safety incidents. Cathie Wood sees Tesla as the largest AI project on Earth. Gary Black raised the price target to $380, citing the potential launch of a $25,000-$30,000 hatchback model. In China, Tesla's sales are also notable. Tesla's stock performance is attributed to renewed confidence in autonomy and future robotics.
